org.apache.paimon.open.api

Class RESTCatalogController

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.apache.paimon.open.api.RESTCatalogController

  • @CrossOrigin(origins="http://localhost:8081")
 @RestController
public class RESTCatalogController
extends Object
    RESTCatalog management APIs.
